howItWorks.intro: This daily fiber intake calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Fiber per Calorie
rules.explanation: At least 14 grams of fiber per 1,000 calories consumed.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: How much fiber do I need?
faq.a: 25g/day for women, 38g/day for men under 50. Most Americans only get 15g.

faq.q: What foods are high in fiber?
faq.a: Beans, lentils, whole grains, fruits, vegetables, and nuts.
